overview: QuizPractice is a web app for students to practice quiz questions with a timer. Students log in, select a subject and chapter, then take timed quizzes with multiple question formats. Performance is tracked over time with a history view. An admin panel allows content management of subjects, chapters, and questions.
features: Quiz sessions with timer and progress bar
Multiple question types: multiple choice, true/false, fill-in-the-blank
Performance history with sortable table and score chart
Admin panel restricted to specific principal ID
Admin: manage subjects, chapters, and questions
Admin: bulk question import via pipe-separated text paste
Pre-loaded content with 3 subjects, 6 chapters, and 100+ questions
